steps.title: Identify the shift between two methods
steps.content: Sentence 1 presents one approach: removal and landfill disposal. Sentence 2 presents a different approach: phytoremediation. The blank signals the transition between these two distinct solutions.

steps.title: Choose the transition that marks the shift
steps.content: ”Alternatively” signals a shift to a different approach—exactly what's needed when moving from one solution to another. The other options either elaborate on the first method, miscast the second as an instance of the first, or invent causation. That confirms A is correct.
